mechanism: Growing oil surplus from OPEC+ compliance breakdown weakens the energy leg of the commodity-rate interaction, loosening one carry-unwind amplifier. However, the agricultural leg may simultaneously tighten, creating a composition disagreement about net vulnerability.
regime_dependence: Active while OPEC+ overproduction continues and non-OPEC supply grows; would reverse on geopolitical supply disruption (e.g., Strait of Hormuz).
